rankings.reason: Captures the most imaginative, high-tech vision of 2050 with skyscraper architecture and seamless, instant transit.
Focuses on traveler comfort and innovative amenities like VR pods, though it lacks the structural ambition of Option C.
Offers practical, realistic technological advancements like personalized displays, but feels less visionary than the top two options.
Relies too heavily on current-day experiences and lacks the futuristic, high-tech creative flair requested for 2050.
